babyDevelopment: Your baby is officially due! They have a firm grasp and are ready to greet the world. The amniotic fluid levels are starting to lower slightly.
bodyChanges: The waiting game! Only 5% of babies arrive exactly on their due date. Your cervix is softening, thinning (effacement), and opening (dilation).
tips: Try to relax and keep your mind occupied
Time your contractions using an app
Remember: your body knows exactly what to do!

do: or have sex if you want to encourage labor
dont: Get discouraged if nothing happens today
Let friends or family stress you out with \"is the baby here yet?\" texts

nutrition: Whatever sounds good to you right now
milestoneDescription: Baby is ready to meet the world! If they are late, don't worry—they are just enjoying their cozy home.
